title: ecp5: can't map true dual port RAM

features.name: true dual port ram with same clock domain
features.description: Code should include a dual-port RAM with two independent read/write ports operating on the same clock domain

features.name: write-through on write-during-read RAM port
features.description: Code should include a RAM port where write enable and read/write mode select signals conditionally route write data directly to read output during write operations
features.snippet: if (wen_1) begin if (wwr_1) begin ram[addr_1] <= wdata_1; rdata_1 <= wdata_1; end else rdata_1 <= ram[addr_1]; end

features.name: synth_ecp5 target for block RAM inference
features.description: Code should include a design that is synthesized with the synth_ecp5 pass targeting ECP5 architecture BRAM inference
